description_long: This is a modern, multi-tiered wooden shelving unit with a striking geometric design, featuring alternating black and natural wood stripes across its surfaces. The structure consists of two main sections at different heights, each with open shelves supported by vertical and horizontal beams. The shelves themselves are composed of slatted wooden planks, creating a visually dynamic pattern of lines and shadows. The open design allows for visibility and access from multiple sides, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public plazas. The construction appears robust, with thick wooden beams providing stability and strength. There are no doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its open, accessible nature.
description: A modern, striped wooden shelving unit with open slatted shelves and a two-level design, featuring bold black and natural wood accents. Its open structure and geometric lines make it ideal for display or storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from the longer side, showing both the taller and shorter sections, with all open slatted shelves and the bold striped pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from the narrow end of the taller section, the striped top and the depth of the shelves are visible, with the slatted pattern seen head-on.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is shown, highlighting the shorter section on the right and the open, slatted construction of the shelves.
description_view_3: The narrow end of the shorter section is visible, emphasizing the geometric slats and the depth of the shelving unit.
